title: Creating and updating Mirror columns via API
excerpt:
I would like to be able to create and manage (update) mirror columns via the API. 
If I am reading the docs correctly, neither is possible and values can only be read. 
Am I correct?

posts.author: olga.banasinska (Olga)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to create and manage (update) mirror columns via the API.

If I am reading the docs correctly, neither is possible and values can only be read.

Am I correct?

posts.author: Billchenau (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @olga.banasinska

Bill here from monday.com

That’s correct. At this stage, you can only read mirror columns and cannot update them.

Cheers,
Bill
